# PERF-153 positive: cookie.String called twice in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-153-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	for _, cookie := range r.Cookies() {
		if cookie.Name == "session" {
			log := cookie.String()
			trace := cookie.String()
			_, _ = log, trace
		}
	}
}
